description: Daily Attendance Reminder - Smart 12:00 local notification that only fires when user hasn't clocked in yet

userStories.title: Create NotificationService with scheduling logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a NotificationService that encapsulates all UNUserNotificationCenter logic for scheduling and cancelling the daily attendance reminder.
acceptanceCriteria: Coldplay/Services/NotificationService.swift exists with a @MainActor singleton NotificationService.shared
Has method requestPermission() that calls UNUserNotificationCenter.requestAuthorization(options: [.alert, .sound])
Has async method checkDenied() that checks for .denied authorization status
Has method scheduleReminder() that creates a UNCalendarNotificationTrigger at hour:12 minute:0 with repeats:true
Has method cancelReminder() that removes pending notification with identifier 'coldplay.attendance.reminder'
Has method evaluateReminder(hasTodayRecord: Bool) that schedules or cancels based on reminderEnabled and hasTodayRecord
Has var reminderEnabled backed by UserDefaults with key 'attendanceReminderEnabled' default true
Notification title and body use LocalizationManager for Traditional Chinese and Japanese strings
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Pattern after CalendarService singleton. Identifier: 'coldplay.attendance.reminder'. Remove old static scheduleDailyReminder() call from ColdplayApp.init() if present.

userStories.title: Add localized strings for notification content and permission alert
userStories.description: As a user, I want all notification-related text in my chosen language (Traditional Chinese or Japanese).
acceptanceCriteria: LocalizationManager has reminderTitle property (zh: '考勤提醒', ja: '勤怠リマインダー')
LocalizationManager has reminderBody property (zh: '今天還沒有打卡，記得打卡喔！', ja: '今日はまだ打刻していません。忘れずに打刻してください！')
LocalizationManager has notificationPermissionTitle property (zh: '需要通知權限', ja: '通知へのアクセスが必要です')
LocalizationManager has notificationPermissionMessage property
LocalizationManager has reminderLabel property for settings toggle (zh: '打卡提醒', ja: '打刻リマインダー')
LocalizationManager has reminderSectionLabel property for settings section (zh: '提醒', ja: 'リマインダー')
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Follow existing pattern in LocalizationManager: computed properties with switch language { case .zhHant: ... case .ja: ... }

userStories.title: Request notification permission on app launch
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to request notification permission at launch so reminders can work.
acceptanceCriteria: In ContentView.task, NotificationService.shared.requestPermission() is called alongside existing calendar permission request
After permission request, evaluateReminder is called with current today record status
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Add to existing .task modifier in ContentView that already handles calendar permission.

userStories.title: Handle denied notification permission with Settings redirect
userStories.description: As a user who denied notification permission, I want to be guided to enable it in iOS Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: ContentView has @State var showNotificationPermissionAlert
After requestPermission fails, checks checkDenied() and sets alert state
On scenePhase change to .active, re-checks denied status when reminderEnabled
Alert shows localized title and message from notificationPermissionTitle/Message
Alert has button opening UIApplication.openSettingsURLString
Alert pattern matches existing calendar permission denied alert
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Mirror the existing showCalendarPermissionAlert pattern in ContentView. Requires @Environment(\.scenePhase).

userStories.title: Cancel reminder when attendance is marked
userStories.description: As a user, I don't want to receive a reminder on days I've already clocked in.
acceptanceCriteria: AttendanceStore.mark() calls NotificationService.shared.cancelReminder() after saving the record
Siri Intents (MarkWorkIntent, MarkRestIntent) coverage is automatic because they go through AttendanceStore.shared
markOvertime() does NOT cancel the reminder (overtime is independent of daily attendance)
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Add one line in AttendanceStore.mark() before the calendar sync call.

userStories.title: Evaluate reminder state on app launch and foreground resume
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to correctly schedule or cancel reminders whenever I open the app or return to it.
acceptanceCriteria: ContentView.task calls evaluateReminder(hasTodayRecord:) after permission request
ContentView has .onChange(of: scenePhase) that calls evaluateReminder on .active
evaluateReminder checks store.record(for: Date()) != nil for today's record
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Requires @Environment(\.scenePhase) private var scenePhase in ContentView.

userStories.title: Add reminder toggle to SettingsView
userStories.description: As a user, I want a toggle in Settings to enable or disable the attendance reminder.
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsView has a new Section with localized reminderSectionLabel
Section contains Toggle with localized reminderLabel
Toggle state backed by @State initialized from NotificationService.shared.reminderEnabled
onChange of toggle syncs to NotificationService.shared.reminderEnabled
When toggled off, cancelReminder() is called immediately
When toggled on, evaluateReminder(hasTodayRecord:) is called to re-schedule if needed
Build succeeds with xcodebuild -scheme Coldplay -sdk iphonesimulator26.2 SYMROOT=/tmp/ColdplayBuild build
userStories.notes: Add new Section above existing language Section in SettingsView List.
